## What does this PR do?


## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Contract change (requires extra review)
- [ ] Documentation

## Security checklist
- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or API keys committed
- [ ] `.env` is in `.gitignore` and not tracked
- [ ] If contract changed: tests updated and passing
- [ ] If contract changed: `deployed-addresses.json` NOT committed

## Testing
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes (backend)
- [ ] `npx hardhat test` passes (contracts)
- [ ] `npm audit` shows no high/critical vulnerabilities
